recommendations.rationale: Positive relative strength and volume expansion, but risk-off market and weak tech ETF confirmation prevent upgrade.
evidence: Latest close HKD 36.32, up 3.36% while broad market and tech ETFs declined
Price is above 20-day moving average 34.25 and near 60-day moving average 36.21
60-day range position 0.529, strongest in the watchlist
risks: Market regime is risk_off, so single-name strength may fail without ETF confirmation
Hang Seng Tech ETFs remain in downtrends
Recent posterior evaluations showed failed bullish Xiaomi calls, keeping timing confidence low
recommendations.invalidation: Close back below the 20-day moving average near HKD 34.25, or loss of relative strength while tech ETFs remain weak.
